subject: Re:
body:
I hope you are coming with a proposed time frame and
schedule for both the office and pool building

--- John Amerling <jamerling@rrcaribbean.com> wrote:

> I am preparing to meet with you at 10 AM on Monday.
> Unless I hear otherwise
> I assume that the meeting will take place at the
> East End Offices. I am
> happy to come out to the island, however, someone
> just needs to tell me
> where to go.
> 
>  
> 
> I ask that you make enough time to cover several
> topics. I will list them
> below and I suggest that between half an hour and an
> hour be set aside,
> apart from issues which you may wish to raise, some
> of which may be covered
> below.
> 
>  
> 
> 1.       Quick Review of Master Plan Document to be
> Filed with CZM
> 
> 2.       Current Status of the Design and Planning
> Effort
> 
> a.       Office
> 
> b.       Indoor Pool
> 
> c.       Employee Locker Room
> 
> d.       Infrastructure
> 
> e.       Phase II and III
> 
> 3.       Further engagement of the Maguire Group
> 
> 4.       Landscape and Hardscape Roles
> 
> 5.       Pool Consultant
> 
> 6.       Vendor Relationships for Finishes
> 
> 7.       Barge Issues and Possibilities
> 
> 8.       Schedule
> 
> 9.       Budgeting and Pricing
> 
>  
> 
> I am attaching notes taken over the course of the
> meetings on Tuesday and
> Wednesday in Foxboro for you information. I have
> told Darren that the dock
> lights can be installed. 
> 
> 


__________________________________________________

body_html:
I hope you are coming with a proposed time frame and
schedule for both the office and pool building

--- John Amerling jamerling@rrcaribbean.com wrote:

I am preparing to meet with you at 10 AM on Monday.
Unless I hear otherwise
I assume that the meeting will take place at the
East End Offices. I am
happy to come out to the island, however, someone
just needs to tell me
where to go.

I ask that you make enough time to cover several
topics. I will list them
below and I suggest that between half an hour and an
hour be set aside,
apart from issues which you may wish to raise, some
of which may be covered
below.

  1.   Quick Review of Master Plan Document to be

Filed with CZM

  1.   Current Status of the Design and Planning

Effort

a. Office

b. Indoor Pool

c. Employee Locker Room

d. Infrastructure

e. Phase II and III

  1.   Further engagement of the Maguire Group

  2.   Landscape and Hardscape Roles

  3.   Pool Consultant

  4.   Vendor Relationships for Finishes

  5.   Barge Issues and Possibilities

  6.   Schedule

  7.   Budgeting and Pricing

I am attaching notes taken over the course of the
meetings on Tuesday and
Wednesday in Foxboro for you information. I have
told Darren that the dock
lights can be installed.
